predictions.source_quote: I expect inflation pressures to subside in 2023 and allow the Fed to pause at 5% to see where things go from there.
expect the 10 year US Treasury to remain below 4%.
our best guess is a 10%-15% y/y decline in S&P earnings in 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: Bottom in H1 2023, October 2022 lows to hold
predictions.source_quote: I expect equity markets to bottom sometime in the first half of next year, and for the October 2022 lows to hold.

predictions.forecast_value: Bottom in Q1/Q2 2023, at levels above 2008 and 2020
predictions.source_quote: We expect a bottom in these manufacturing surveys in Q1/Q2 of 2023, and at levels that are above 2008 and 2020.
US durable goods inflation is now roughly 0% with the potential for deflation in early 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: Dampen substantially as housing collapse feeds through
predictions.source_quote: the collapse in housing (whose speed now rivals the housing decline during the double dip recession of the 1980's) should dampen inflation substantially in 2023.
another reason why we believe that inflation will slow meaningfully in 2023.
